Metadata.title: International Shopping Platform
Metadata.description: Cross-border ecommerce app shell with BFF and contract-first architecture.

HomePage.title: Phase 1 account and address pages now run on the real flow.
HomePage.description: You can move from sign in, registration, email verification, and password reset straight into a working account center with profile and address management.

session.title: Session safety first
session.description: Login, registration, verification, and logout all stay behind the BFF so sensitive protocol details do not leak into page code.

address.title: Default address up front
address.description: A complete shipping profile makes the checkout path much shorter once cart and order pages land.

checkout.title: Built for the next phase
checkout.description: Phase 1 gives users everything they need before entering cart, checkout, and payment flows.

AuthShell.footer: Completing identity and address details early removes avoidable friction later in checkout.

unauthorized.title: Login is required
unauthorized.description: Your session is missing or expired. Sign in and retry.

csrf.title: Security validation failed
csrf.description: CSRF validation failed. Refresh and submit again.

rateLimit.title: Too many requests
rateLimit.description: Request frequency is limited. Please retry later.

server.title: Service temporarily unavailable
server.description: Upstream service failed. Retry and report the trace ID if it persists.

unknown.title: Request failed
unknown.description: The request failed unexpectedly. Retry or contact support with trace ID.

LoginPage.title: Return to your global shopping account
LoginPage.description: Sign in to review profile data, manage saved addresses, and prepare the account for later cart and checkout flows.
LoginPage.cardDescription: Use a username, email address, or phone number. Add a country code only when the account field is a phone number.

hints.account: Using the most familiar identifier keeps the login path short and obvious.
hints.countryCode: Only needed when the account field contains a phone number.

errors.title: Sign in failed
errors.submitFailed: The login request failed. Please try again.

RegisterPage.title: Build identity first, then enter the full buying flow
RegisterPage.description: Registration moves directly into email verification so the same session can continue into profile and address completion.
RegisterPage.cardDescription: Submit the core account fields first, then verify the mailbox in the next step.

hints.phone: Phone is optional, but filling it in now helps with later notifications and account recovery.

verify.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your email to activate the account and keep moving.
verify.statusDelivered: The message was delivered. Check the inbox and spam folders.
verify.statusPending: The message is still moving through the delivery pipeline. Check again shortly.

success.title: Email verified
success.description: The session is now active. Continue into the account center to finish profile and address setup.

errors.title: Registration flow failed
errors.passwordMismatch: The password confirmation does not match.
errors.submitFailed: The registration request failed. Please try again.
errors.verifyFailed: Email verification failed. Check the code and retry.
errors.resendFailed: Resending the activation email failed. Please try again later.
errors.statusFailed: Checking the email delivery status failed. Please try again later.

ForgotPasswordPage.title: Verify identity first, then reset the account password
ForgotPasswordPage.description: Password recovery uses a dedicated code flow and restores the session on success so work can continue immediately.
ForgotPasswordPage.cardDescription: Start by requesting a verification code, then set the new password in the next step.

hints.countryCode: Only needed when password recovery uses a phone number.

reset.description: Enter the verification code and the new password. Success restores the current session.

success.title: Password updated
success.description: The new password is active and the session is ready. Continue into the account center.

errors.title: Password recovery failed
errors.requestFailed: Requesting the verification code failed. Please try again.
errors.passwordMismatch: The new password confirmation does not match.
errors.resetFailed: Password reset failed. Check the verification code and retry.

AccountPage.title: Lock down profile and address details before checkout arrives
AccountPage.description: This screen combines account data, profile details, and the address book so Phase 1 users can reach a checkout-ready state in one place.

readiness.title: Checkout readiness
readiness.description: Once these items are complete, later checkout pages can reuse them directly.

navigation.title: Jump links
navigation.description: Move straight to the section that needs work now.

accountForm.title: Account information
accountForm.description: Keep login identifiers and baseline contact details current so downstream notices remain stable.
accountForm.successMessage: The nickname and phone details were saved.

profileForm.title: Profile details
profileForm.description: Display name, gender, and location details help later pages speak to the user more naturally.
profileForm.successMessage: The profile details are now up to date.

addressSection.title: Address book
addressSection.description: Manage shipping addresses here. The default one will be preferred in later order flows.
addressSection.emptyDescription: Add a complete shipping address now so future checkout screens can prefill it.
addressSection.createMessage: The new shipping address was added to the address book.
addressSection.defaultMessage: Future order flows will prefer this address.
addressSection.deleteMessage: The address was removed from the address book.
addressSection.deleteConfirmDescription: It will no longer be available for future orders unless you create it again.

addressDialog.description: Fill the core recipient and location fields first so the shipping path remains reliable.

errors.title: Address is incomplete
errors.required: Please fill recipient, phone, country code, country, and address line 1.

errors.title: Action failed
errors.accountSaveFailed: Saving account information failed. Please retry.
errors.profileSaveFailed: Saving profile details failed. Please retry.
errors.addressSaveFailed: Saving the address failed. Please retry.
errors.addressDefaultFailed: Changing the default address failed. Please retry.
errors.addressDeleteFailed: Deleting the address failed. Please retry.

layout.quote: "Experience seamless cross-border shopping with a curated selection of global fashion and lifestyle products, delivered straight to your door."

social.comingSoon: Social sign-in is not available yet.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to your account to continue shopping.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Join GlobalLink and start your cross-border journey.
register.legalPrefix: By clicking continue, you agree to our

forgot.title: Reset access
forgot.subtitle: Start with email verification, then set a new password.

form.resendSuccess: A new verification code has been sent.

errors.loginFailed: The login request failed. Please try again.
errors.registerFailed: The registration request failed. Please try again.
errors.verifyFailed: Verification failed. Please check the code and retry.
errors.resetRequestFailed: The password reset request failed. Please try again.
errors.resetFailed: The password reset request failed. Please check the code and retry.
errors.resendFailed: Resending the verification code failed. Please try again.

success.verifyDescription: Your account is verified and ready to use. Redirecting you...
success.resetDescription: Your password has been updated and the account is ready to continue.

common.comingSoon: This module is not available yet.
common.invalidPhone: Enter the phone number in international format, for example +1 234 567 8900.
common.addressSaveFailed: Saving the address failed. Please try again.
common.logoutFailed: Signing out failed. Please try again.

sidebar.logoutConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to exit?

dialog.description: Search for your address or move the pin on the map to autofill your location.

validation.required: Please complete name, phone, country, and address line 1.
